name: veracity
description: Veracity - A Florence-inspired narrative puzzle game about a girl, her robot companions, and a journey to save her father

scripts.deploy: npm run build && git checkout --orphan gh-pages-temp && git rm -rf . && cp -r dist/. . && rm -rf dist && git add -A && git commit -m 'Deploy to GitHub Pages' && git push origin gh-pages-temp:gh-pages --force && git checkout main && git branch -D gh-pages-temp
